en-US.name: Bhaiya — Jarvis AI
en-US.summary: Your personal AI assistant with ad-free music, real-time search, and full Hindi support.
en-US.description: Jarvis AI lets you play any song ad-free from YouTube, ask questions using advanced AI, get real-time news, search Google and YouTube by voice, write content, and more. Say 'Alexa, Bhaiya' to start. Supports Hindi commands like 'sahiba gana chalado'.
examplePhrases: Alexa, Bhaiya, who is Virat Kohli

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'Alexa, open Bhaiya' then 'Sahiba gana chalado'.
